race.comment: Lots of these look to be making up the numbers but a few look ready to fire over the mile. FOXY RASCAL (1) got well out of his ground over 1400m last time but came with a big run from the back and finished fifth. Ideally suited here and can get off the mark. Same goes for LORD MOMO (5) who has wound up powerfully last two and looks a leading chance. WHO'S TALKING (3) is another who has been hitting the line well. Drew wide last time and has a wide gate here too but will be doing best work late. SEA OF GALILEE (2) was fourth on wet ground last time. Has had a lot of chances but is rarely far away and can do better. BOB THE BAKER (12) turned in a fair return but is fitter and should improve.
